evidence_snippet: Ursula Upcliff joined the alliance of «First Men» houses, petty kings, and clans summoned by «Robar II Royce», «High King of the Vale, the Fingers, and the Mountains of the Moon»,
Ursula rode a bloodred horse in the «Battle of the Seven Stars», during which she tried to curse «Torgold Tollett». However, according to singers, Torgold leapt upon Ursula's horse
Ursula Upcliff joined the alliance of «First Men» houses, petty kings, and clans summoned by «Robar II Royce», «High King of the Vale, the Fingers, and the Mountains of the Moon»,
